scripts.dev: PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" DB_PATH="${DB_PATH:-$PWD/../tmp/xstream.db}" bash -c 'command -v cargo >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "[server-rust] cargo not found on PATH (looked in $HOME/.cargo/bin too). Install rustup: https://rustup.rs"; exit 127; }; echo "[server-rust] starting xstream-server (cold build can take 30–60s)…"; exec cargo run --manifest-path Cargo.toml'
